zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Crichton Of Sanquhar於大約1435年出生在蘇格蘭度福利爾桑哈爾時，她的父親Sir Robert Crichton 5th of Sanquhar28歲，母親Elizabeth Ann de Erskine Baroness Gibson22歲。她於1455年之前與Lord William Douglas 4th Of Drumlanrig在蘇格蘭度福利爾結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1539年10月在蘇格蘭度福利爾德盧姆藍利 卡素享年105歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭度福利爾德盧姆藍利 卡素。

nameMeanings.name: Crichton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Creighton
meanings: Scottish and Irish: habitational name from Crichton, near Edinburgh, first recorded c. 1128 in the form Crectune, in 1287 as Crecton, and in 1360 as Creychtona. The name is probably an early hybrid compound of Old Welsh creic ‘rock’ + Older Scots tun ‘farm, settlement’ (Old English tūn). In Ireland and Britain, this form of the name is now found chiefly in northern Ireland; the more usual Scottish forms are Crichton and Crighton .
Irish: sometimes used for Gaelic Ó Creacháin or Ó Criocháin (see Crehan ).
English: habitational name from Creighton in Staffordshire, named with Celtic creig ‘rock’ + Old English tūn ‘settlement’.

nameMeanings.name: Of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese: Cheng, Jing, Kam Fung, Wai Shing, Wing, Yali, Yuk.
variant Romanization of the surnames 歐 and 區, see   Ou   1 and 2.

variants.name: Ou
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Wei, Ying, Ching, Heng, Hong, Jia, Kuang Yu, Li-Ching, Cho, Chong, Chung, Sa.  Southeast Asian Lichun, Ming, Quan, Roeun, Sokhom, Chau, Hai, Leang, Ly, Nhanh, Phan, Pho, Tha.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 歐, meaning ‘to sing someone's praise’ in ancient Chinese: (i) from the placename Dong Ou (東甌), a fief (in present-day Wenzhou in Zhejiang province) which was granted to Yao in 192  BC . It is said that Yao was a descendant of Wujiang (reigned 355–333  BC ), king of the state of Yue (located mainly in present-day Zhejiang and Jiangxi provinces) during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ). (ii) from the placename Ou Yu (歐餘), the name of a fief (located in present-day Zhejiang province) that was granted to Ti, the second son of Wujiang (reigned 355–333  BC ), king of the state of Yue (located mainly in present-day Zhejiang and Jiangxi provinces) during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ).

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 區, originally denoting an ancient vessel for measurement in ancient Chinese: from the personal name of Ou Zhizi (歐治子), an expert sword-maker who lived during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476 BC ). Some of his descendants inherited Ou (歐) as their surname, simplifying the Chinese character 歐 to 區.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Crichton Of Sanquhar was born about 1435, in Sanquhar, Dumfriesshire, Scotland, her father, Sir Robert Crichton 5th of Sanquhar, was 28 and her mother, Elizabeth Ann de Erskine Baroness Gibson, was 22. She married Lord William Douglas 4th Of Drumlanrig before 1455, in Dumfriesshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 4 daughters. She died in October 1539, in Drumlanrig Castle, Dumfriesshire, Scotland, at the age of 105, and was buried in Drumlanrig Castle, Dumfriesshire, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Crichton Of Sanquhar est née environ 1435, à Sanquhar, Dumfriesshire, Écosse, son père, Sir Robert Crichton 5th of Sanquhar, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Ann d’Erskine Baroness Gibson, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé Lord William Douglas 4th Of Drumlanrig avant 1455, à Dumfriesshire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée en octobre 1539, à Drumlanrig Castle, Dumfriesshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 105 ans, et a été enterrée à Drumlanrig Castle, Dumfriesshire, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth Crichton Of Sanquhar um 1435 in Sanquhar, Dumfriesshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Robert Crichton 5th of Sanquhar 28 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth Ann de Erskine Baroness Gibson 22. Sie hat vor 1455 in Dumfriesshire, Scotland Lord William Douglas 4th Of Drumlanrig geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb im Oktober 1539 im Alter von 105 Jahren in Drumlanrig Castle, Dumfriesshire, Scotland und wurde in Drumlanrig Castle, Dumfriesshire, Scotland begraben.

Lei sposato Lord William Douglas 4th Of Drumlanrig prima del 1455, nel Dumfriesshire, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 4 figlie. ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Crichton Of Sanquharが約1435年にスコットランドダムフリーシュアイアサンクハーで生まれた時，父Sir Robert Crichton 5th of Sanquharは28歳，母Elizabeth Ann de Erskine Baroness Gibsonは22歳であった。1455年以前にスコットランドダムフリーシュアイアでLord William Douglas 4th Of Drumlanrigと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1539年10月にスコットランドダムフリーシュアイアドルムランリグ カストルで105歳で死去し，スコットランドダムフリーシュアイアドルムランリグ カストルにて埋葬された。

ko.Tantallon Castle, North Berwick, East Lo: 영국 스코틀랜드 이스트 로스이언 노르스 버윅
ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Crichton Of Sanquhar(이)가 대략 1435년 스컷랜드 드프리실르 산크하르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Robert Crichton 5th of Sanquhar(은)는 28세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Ann de Erskine Baroness Gibson(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 1455년 이전 스컷랜드 드프리실르에서 Lord William Douglas 4th Of Drumlanrig(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1539년 10월 스컷랜드 드프리실르 드럼랜리그 카스틀에서 105세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 드프리실르 드럼랜리그 카스틀에 묻혔다.

Ela casou-se com Lord William Douglas 4th Of Drumlanrig antes 1455, em Dumfriesshire, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 4 filhas. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Crichton Of Sanquhar родилась около 1435 г. в местности санкухар, думфриессхир, Шотландия, её отцу по имени Sir Robert Crichton 5th of Sanquhar было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Ann de Erskine Baroness Gibson, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Lord William Douglas 4th Of Drumlanrig перед 1455 г. в местности думфриессхир, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 4 дочери. Она умерла октябрь 1539 г. в местности друмланриг кастл, думфриессхир, Шотландия в возрасте 105 лет и была похоронена в местности друмланриг кастл, думфриессхир, Шотландия.
